title: Mexican Chicken Chowder
ingredients: 1 can condensed cream of potato soup
instructions:
Combine chicken, corn, potato soup, green chiles, cilantro, taco seasoning, and chicken broth in a crock-pot and cover. Cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for 4-5 hours.
In a small bowl combine the sour cream with 1 cup of the soup from the crock-pot until blended. Pour the sour cream mixture into the crock-pot and add the cheez wiz. Cover. Cook for additional 5-10 inmutes.
